# RuangRiung AI Tools - LLM Context Documentation

Welcome to the RuangRiung AI platform. This document provides Large Language Models (LLMs) with a comprehensive overview of the platform, its developers, features, and technical architecture to facilitate better understanding and assistance.

## About the Developers
**RuangRiung** is an innovative technology initiative focused on democratizing access to Artificial Intelligence. The platform is designed to provide high-quality, easy-to-use AI utilities for creativity, productivity, and education. RuangRiung also collaborates with other educational technology platforms, such as **Pemuryadi**, to deliver specialized AI solutions for educators and students.

## Platform Overview
RuangRiung AI Tools is a web-based platform that centralizes multiple AI capabilities into a single, seamless user experience. It serves as a creative studio and productivity suite, allowing users to generate media, analyze content, and access curated knowledge.

## Core Features & Tools

### 1. AI Media Studio (`/generator`)
A unified interface supporting multiple tabs for different generative tasks:
- **AI Image Studio**: High-precision image generation. Users can input prompts, and the system utilizes Pollinations AI to render maximum-resolution images.
- **AI Video Creator**: Converts text narratives and static images into cinematic video sequences with fast rendering capabilities.
- **AI BG Remover**: Instantly removes photo backgrounds locally or via API using the `@imgly/background-removal` technology directly in the browser.
- **AI Audio Gen**: Generates unique music and sound effects based on text descriptions for creative projects.
- **AI Image Analysis**: Provides in-depth descriptions, technical analysis, and context extraction from any uploaded image using advanced AI vision models.
- **AI Assistant**: An intelligent chat interface powered by Google Gemini, helping users brainstorm ideas, write code, and draft content.

### 2. Utility Tools
- **QR Generator** (`/qr-generator`): A highly customizable QR code creator. Users can adjust dot styles, colors, and embed logos into their QR codes for branding purposes.

### 3. Knowledge Base
- **Prompt Library (Kumpulan Prompt)** (`/kumpulan-prompt`): A curated repository of specific instruction prompts designed to yield optimal AI results. The library is built on markdown files that are statically indexed into JSON for lightning-fast client-side rendering and SEO optimization.

### 4. Ecosystem Integrations
- **Pemuryadi Generator** (`https://digen.id`): An external educational AI platform resulting from a collaboration between Pemuryadi & RuangRiung. It is specifically designed to help Indonesian teachers instantly compile Teaching Modules (Modul Ajar), Lesson Plans (RPP Kurikulum Merdeka), school administration, and various other educational modules.

## Technical Architecture & Stack

### Frontend
- **Framework**: React 19 with TypeScript, built using Vite 6.
- **Routing**: React Router v7 for client-side navigation.
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS v4 with dark mode support.
- **Animations**: Motion (formerly framer-motion) for smooth UI transitions and micro-interactions.
- **Icons**: Lucide React.

### Backend & APIs
- **Cloudflare Pages / Workers**: The application is designed to be deployed on Cloudflare Pages, utilizing Wrangler for edge functions and API proxying.
- **AI Models**: 
  - Integrates `@google/genai` (Google Gemini) for text, chat, and image analysis capabilities.
  - Utilizes Pollinations API endpoints for seamless, unauthenticated image generation.
- **Content Management**: A custom Node.js script (`scripts/index-content.mjs`) parses markdown files (`.md`) at build time, extracting YAML frontmatter and content into a centralized `prompts-index.json` file. This allows the React app to display a blog-like prompt directory without a traditional CMS or database.

### Security & Sanitization
- **HTML Sanitization**: Uses `isomorphic-dompurify` to safely render HTML from markdown conversions, preventing XSS attacks when displaying prompt contents.

## Vision
RuangRiung aims to continuously evolve by integrating state-of-the-art AI models and providing a user-centric interface that bridges the gap between complex AI technologies and everyday creative or educational needs.
